---
title: "\'Miss Yonge\'s Novels\'"
---

## \'Miss Yonge\'s Novels\'

**Author:** Sir John Duke Coleridge
**Date:** 1853
**Imprint:** Christian Remembrancer 26, 33-63

### Notes

This article caused offence to CMY\'s family despite its approving tone.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
